items.title: Fernando Mendoza learning to play from under center for the first time in the NFL
items.summary: Mendoza took almost all his snaps in the shotgun in college. That won't be the case with the Raiders.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Bringing up Kartik Sharma, with a little 'duty of care' from Dhoni and Fleming
items.summary: Kartik Sharma has had a rough time of it after joining CSK for a record fee, but finally came good with a match-winning half-century against Mumbai Indians
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
